package.name: diy_estop_controller
package.description: E-stop controller bridge for DIY Challenge 2026. Monitors heartbeat from STM32 via micro-ROS and publishes /estop_active. If heartbeat is lost for more than 800 ms the node treats it as an E-stop. The actual hardware E-stop path lives entirely in the STM32 firmware; this node provides only the advisory ROS-side mirror required so that Nav2 and cmd_vel_mux can pause gracefully.
